info.title: Athena API
info.description: REST API for Project Athena - Personal productivity and task management

description.example: Review the authentication changes in PR #123

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated time to complete in minutes

description.example: Review the authentication changes in PR #123

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated time to complete in minutes

tagIds.description: Tag UUIDs to associate with the task

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated time in minutes (null to clear)

taskCount.description: Number of tasks in the project

description.example: Complete redesign of the marketing website

userId.description: User UUID to add as participant

description.example: Daily standup meeting for the engineering team

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

source.description: Event source (local or synced from external calendar)

sourceIntegrationId.description: Integration ID if event is from external source

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

participantIds.description: User UUIDs to add as participants

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

projectCount.description: Number of projects in this initiative

description.example: Key objectives for the first quarter

parentId.description: Parent initiative UUID for hierarchical initiatives
Parent initiative UUID for hierarchical initiatives

linkedTasks.description: Tasks linked to this time block with their positions

position.description: Task position within the time block

recurrenceRule.description: iCalendar RRULE for recurring time blocks
iCalendar RRULE for recurring time blocks

taskIds.description: Task UUIDs to link to this time block

position.description: Position in the task list (defaults to end)

dailyPlanningTime.description: Daily planning reminder time (HH:MM format, null to clear)

dailyReviewTime.description: Daily review reminder time (HH:MM format, null to clear)

successUrl.description: URL to redirect after successful checkout

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect after cancelled checkout

returnUrl.description: URL to return to after portal session

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default payment method

cancelAtPeriodEnd.description: Whether subscription will cancel at period end

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current session

post.description: Associate a tag with a task.

delete.description: Remove a tag association from a task.

post.description: Add a dependency relationship between two tasks.

delete.description: Remove a dependency relationship between two tasks.

post.description: Create a new task.

get.description: Retrieve a list of tasks with optional filtering and pagination.

schema.description: Maximum number of tasks to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return
parameters.name: limit

delete.description: Delete a task by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve a single task by its ID.

patch.description: Update an existing task. Only provided fields will be updated.

get.description: Retrieve all tasks that this task depends on.

post.description: Add a dependency relationship between two projects.

delete.description: Remove a dependency relationship between two projects.

post.description: Create a new project.

get.description: Retrieve a list of projects with optional filtering and pagination.

schema.description: Maximum number of projects to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of projects to return
parameters.name: limit

delete.description: Delete a project by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve a single project by its ID.

patch.description: Update an existing project. Only provided fields will be updated.

get.description: Retrieve all projects that this project depends on.

post.description: Add a user as a participant to an event.
Create a new event.

get.description: Retrieve a list of events with optional date filtering and pagination.

schema.description: Filter events starting on or after this date

parameters.description: Filter events starting on or after this date
parameters.name: startDate

schema.description: Filter events starting before this date

parameters.description: Filter events starting before this date
parameters.name: endDate

schema.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return
parameters.name: limit

delete.description: Delete an event by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve a single event by its ID.

patch.description: Update an existing event. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Remove a participant from an event.

patch.description: Update the RSVP status of an event participant.

post.description: Create a new initiative.

get.description: Retrieve a list of initiatives with optional filtering and pagination.

schema.description: Maximum number of initiatives to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of initiatives to return
parameters.name: limit

delete.description: Soft-delete an initiative by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve a single initiative by its ID.

patch.description: Update an existing initiative. Only provided fields will be updated.

post.description: Create a new time block.

get.description: Retrieve a list of time blocks with optional date filtering and pagination.

schema.description: Filter time blocks starting on or after this date

parameters.description: Filter time blocks starting on or after this date
parameters.name: startDate

schema.description: Filter time blocks ending before this date

parameters.description: Filter time blocks ending before this date
parameters.name: endDate

schema.description: Maximum number of time blocks to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of time blocks to return
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Number of time blocks to skip

parameters.description: Number of time blocks to skip
parameters.name: offset

delete.description: Soft-delete a time block by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve a single time block by its ID.

patch.description: Update an existing time block. Only provided fields will be updated.

post.description: Link a task to a time block.

400.description: Validation error or task already linked

404.description: Time block or task not found

put.description: Reorder the tasks linked to a time block.

400.description: Validation error (e.g., task IDs do not match)

delete.description: Remove the link between a task and a time block.

404.description: Time block or task link not found

get.description: Retrieve the current user's settings.

patch.description: Update the current user's settings. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Permanently delete the user account and all associated data.

get.description: Retrieve account information and usage statistics.
Export all user data as JSON for GDPR compliance.

post.description: Cancel subscription at the end of the current billing period.

get.description: Check if user has access to a specific feature.

post.description: Create a Stripe checkout session for plan upgrade.
Create a Stripe customer portal session for billing management.

delete.description: Delete a saved payment method.

get.description: Get all feature entitlements for the current plan.
Get billing history and invoices.

schema.description: Maximum number of invoices to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of invoices to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get saved payment methods.
Get all available subscription plans. Does not require authentication.
Get current subscription status and plan details.

post.description: Resume a cancelled subscription before it expires.
Set a payment method as the default.

delete.description: Delete a registered passkey.

post.description: Generate new backup codes. This invalidates any existing codes.

get.description: Get information about backup codes for the current user.
Get all linked OAuth accounts.
Get all registered passkeys.
Get all active sessions for the current user.

post.description: Revoke all sessions except the current one.

delete.description: Revoke a specific session.
Unlink an OAuth account.

post.description: Verify a backup code for account recovery. Does not require authentication.

get.description: Get list of configured notification channels.
Get notification preferences for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Update notification preferences for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get notifications for the authenticated user with pagination.
Get unread notifications for the authenticated user.

schema.description: Maximum number of notifications to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of notifications to return
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user.
Mark a specific notification as read.
Schedule a notification for later delivery.
Send a notification to a user (admin/system use).
Connect a new integration.

409.description: Integration already exists for this provider

post.description: Create a new mapping for an integration.

get.description: Get all mappings for an integration.

delete.description: Delete a mapping.
Disconnect (remove) an integration.

get.description: Get a specific integration by ID.
List all linked integrations for the authenticated user.
Find a mapping by local entity type and ID.
Find a mapping by external ID.
Get OAuth authorization URL for a provider.

post.description: Handle incoming webhook from an integration provider.
Mark a mapping as synced from external.
Mark a mapping as synced to external.

delete.description: Delete an event from all bidirectional connections.

put.description: Sync an event to all bidirectional connections.

delete.description: Delete an event from external calendar.

put.description: Sync (create or update) an event to external calendar.

get.description: Get OAuth URL for a calendar provider.
List all calendar connections for the authenticated user.

post.description: Handle OAuth callback from calendar provider.
Push a local event to external calendar.
Trigger sync for all calendar connections.
Trigger a sync for a calendar connection.

patch.description: Update sync settings for a calendar connection.
